{{Quote|Take your feet off the table! You complain of sand in my food—when you put your feet on my dinner table? You have the manners of dragons!|Grake, confronting [[Hethrir]]'s [[Proctor (Empire Reborn)|Proctors]] over quality of dinner|<ref name="The Crystal Star">''[[The Crystal Star]]''</ref>}}
'''Grake''' was a female member of the [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Veubg]] species. She was a slave at [[Hethrir]]'s private [[Worldcraft]] in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]] during the [[Empire Reborn]] insurgency. Grake worked as a cook in Hethrir's kitchen, preparing food for the captive children.

==Biography==
{{Quote|A joke? Sand—in ''my'' food?|Grake|<ref name="The Crystal Star" />}}
Once, angered by the ill manners of the [[Proctor (Empire Reborn)|Proctors]] stationed there who complained of sand in their food, Grake used her spatula to hit the heads of several Proctors before throwing out fruit to the younger and lower-ranking captive children who were starved. She was not killed since she quickly went back to her duties in the kitchen. Later, when [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Chief of State (New Republic|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] arrived on the Worldcraft to reclaim her children and liberate the captive children, Leia freed Grake from her slavery.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Crystal Star]]'' {{1st}}
